case_title: CRONEY, AARON VS BMS INVESTMENT 1 LLC C/O RICHARD STRATTON, ESQ et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES & COSTS FILED /GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRONEY, AARON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BMS INVESTMENT 1 LLC   C/O RICHARD STRATTON, ESQ TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC THE COURT FINDS THAT THE BROKEN ELEVATOR DID NOT DETREMENTALLY INTERFER WITH AARON CRONEY'S OCCUPANCY OF HIS APARTMENT.
